title_clean: Without forgiveness I will still be blind.
idea_clean: Without forgiveness I will still be blind. Sin is the symbol of attack. Behold it anywhere, and I will suffer. For forgiveness is the only means whereby Christ's vision comes to me. Let me accept what His sight shows me as the simple truth, and I am healed completely. Brother, come and let me look on you. Your loveliness reflects my own. Your sinlessness is mine. You stand forgiven, and I stand with you. So would I look on everyone today. My brothers are Your Sons. Your Fatherhood created them, and gave them all to me as part of You, and my own Self as well. Today I honor You through them, and thus I hope this day to recognize my Self.

practice_instructions.frequency: Twice a day (morning/evening), plus hourly remembrance and response to temptation
practice_instructions.duration: As long as it makes you happy
practice_instructions.description: Morning/night: Spend quiet time meditating on the lesson and prayer. Hourly: Take a brief moment to remember God. Response to temptation: Use the idea to quiet any upset.

prayer: So would I look on everyone today. My brothers are Your Sons. Your Fatherhood created them, and gave them all to me as part of You, and my own Self as well. Today I honor You through them, and thus I hope this day to recognize my Self.
